english translation text: In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: يَا ذَا الْحَوْلِ،يَا ذَا الطّوْلِ
english translation text: O the Lord of power; O the Lord of bounty;
O He Who has chosen Muhammad and granted him victory;
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and forgive me every sin that I have committed

arabic text: وَنَسِيتُهُ أَنَا وَهُوَ عِنْدَكَ فِي كِتَابٍ مُبِينٍ
english translation text: and forgotten, but it is recorded with You in a Manifest Record.
